title: Medak Fort
tagline: Medak Fort — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: Medak Fort is situated in Medak district in the Indian state of Telangana, about 100 kilometres from the state capital, Hyderabad.
overview.description: Medak Fort is situated in Medak district in the Indian state of Telangana, about 100 kilometres from the state capital, Hyderabad. Medak fort was constructed by the Kakatiya Kings. The fort lies to the north of the city and can be reached by road. It is a citadel built on a hillock that provided as a vantage point for the Kakatiya rulers in medieval India.

topPlaces.name: Medak
topPlaces.description: Medak, formerly known as Siddapuram, is a town in Medak district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is a municipality and the headquarters of Medak mandal in Medak revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Medak Cathedral
topPlaces.description: Medak Cathedral at Medak in Telangana, India, is one of the largest churches in India and has been the cathedral church of the Diocese of Medak of the Church of South India since 1947. Originally built by Charles Walker Posnett British Wesleyan Methodists, it was consecrated on 25 December 1924.

topPlaces.name: Kuchadri Venkateshwara Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Kuchadri Venkateswara Swamy temple is an ancient Hindu temple of Lord Balaji in Kuchanpally village of Medak mandal of Medak district in Indian state of Telangana. In 2011 then government of andhra pradesh declared kuchadri temple as a protected monument.

items.note: Medak, formerly known as Siddapuram, is a town in Medak district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is a municipality and the headquarters of Medak mandal in Medak revenue division.

Medak Cathedral at Medak in Telangana, India, is one of the largest churches in India and has been the cathedral church of the Diocese of Medak of the Church of South India since 1947. Originally built by Charles Walker Posnett British Wesleyan Methodists, it was consecrated on 25 December 1924.

Kuchadri Venkateswara Swamy temple is an ancient Hindu temple of Lord Balaji in Kuchanpally village of Medak mandal of Medak district in Indian state of Telangana. In 2011 then government of andhra pradesh declared kuchadri temple as a protected monument.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Medak Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Medak Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Medak Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (73 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Medak Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Medak Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Medak Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Medak Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Medak Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Medak, Medak Cathedral, Kuchadri Venkateshwara Swamy Temple.
